stories.headline: Announcement of the passing of voice actress Yamazaki Kazkana, known for voicing Mori Ran in Detective Conan.
stories.body: 【毛利蘭の声優 山崎和佳奈さん死去】 https://news.yahoo.co.jp/pickup/6580226

stories.headline: Elon Musk reacts humorously to a Christopher Nolan meme
stories.body: He actually did the meme 🤣🤣

stories.headline: xAI announces early beta release of Grok Build for SuperGrok Heavy subscribers.
stories.body:
An early beta of Grok Build, an agentic CLI for coding, building apps, and automating workflows is now available for SuperGrok Heavy subscribers.

Through this early beta, we will improve the model and product based on your feedback.

Try it at https://x.ai/cli
